commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary – 08 Jul

NYSE dominates liquidity rankings with exceptional performance across all three metrics: minimal price impact (ILLIQ=0.0020) and the tightest spreads (Roll: 1.06%, AR: 0.42%). Conversely, London Stock Exchange significantly trails at rank six, exhibiting substantially higher price impact (ILLIQ=0.1377—nearly 70x NYSE's level) and the widest AR spread (0.87%). Notably, Nasdaq 100 maintains strong liquidity despite slightly elevated roll spreads, while European continental exchanges occupy the middle tier with moderate spread compression.
